seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blewitt Springs and Blinman. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Blewitt Springs vs Blinman: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blewitt Springs and Blinman.
heading: Blewitt Springs vs Blinman — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blewitt Springs, South Australia and Blinman, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blinman has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Blewitt Springs (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blewitt Springs or Blinman safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blewitt Springs has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Blinman scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blewitt Springs scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Blinman scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blewitt Springs or Blinman?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blinman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
